phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte dos Caracóis is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a Fonte dos Caracóis?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah eh-zah-tah-MEN-chee ah FON-chee doosh kah-rah-KOYSH
phrases.cultural_note: Staff in Portuguese heritage sites typically use direct spatial references for quick navigation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao Jardim Mexicano.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the Mexican Garden.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the Mexican Garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao Jardim Mexicano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fonte dos Caracóis is
phrases.text_local: Poderia informar onde fica a Fonte dos Caracóis?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-dih-REEUH een-foo-ruh-MAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih DOOSH kuh-ruh-KAWEESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Fonte dos Caracóis is a decorative shell-shaped fountain in the romantic gardens of Monserrate.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte dos Caracóis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih DOOSH kuh-ruh-KAWEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Fonte dos Caracóis.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Fonte dos Caracóis.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih DOOSH kuh-ruh-KAWEESH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte dos Caracóis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardim Mexicano is
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar a localização do Jardim Mexicano?
phrases.pronunciation: po-DEN (n blends with i) in-di-KAR uh lo-ka-li-za-SOWN doo zhar-DJEEM me-shi-KAH-noo
phrases.cultural_note: Staff in heritage sites prioritize clear cardinal or zone-based directions for large grounds.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Mexicano, perto do Vale dos Fetos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo, PEHR-too DOO VAH-lih DOOSH FEH-toosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Jardim Mexicano, near the Vale dos Fetos.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Jardim Mexicano, near the Vale dos Fetos.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo, PEHR-too DOO VAH-lih DOOSH FEH-toosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Mexicano, perto do Vale dos Fetos.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala Mudejar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh moo-dih-ZHAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sala Mudejar.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sala Mudejar.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh moo-dih-ZHAHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala Mudejar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the Pátio das Palmeiras
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho mais rápido para o Pátio das Palmeiras?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo MEYESH RAH-pee-doo PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo DUHSH pahl-MAY-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Visitors often navigate historic estates using prominent architectural features as landmarks.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Pátio das Palmeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo DUHSH pahl-MAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Pátio das Palmeiras.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Pátio das Palmeiras.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAHT-yoo DUHSH pahl-MAY-ruhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Pátio das Palmeiras.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Mexicano.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Mexican Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Mexican Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN meh-shee-KAHN-noo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sala Mudejar is located
phrases.text_local: Onde se situa a Sala Mudejar dentro do palácio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH see-TOOUH AH SAH-luh moo-dih-ZHAHR DAYNGT-roo DOO puh-LAHS-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Interior rooms in Portuguese palaces are usually accessed via main staircases with clear signage.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala Mudejar.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh moo-dih-ZHAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sala Mudejar.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh moo-dih-ZHAHR.
